title: entitlements — field classification
description: Entitlement rows are mostly public/internal. No PII. correlation_id may reference confidential entities but is treated as internal.

regulated_financial: EntitlementUsage.* rows where source Entitlement.is_metered_billing=true — constitute revenue-recognition evidence
audit_log: audits.entitlements.* rows for override events + reset events

notes: notes column carries platform-admin's override reason — may reference contract details. Treated as internal.

correlation_id points to source entity (delivery, notification, etc). The correlated entity's classification applies transitively — an EntitlementUsage row pointing at a device_token consumption inherits the token's `restricted` classification for cross-reference queries.
